Notice And Motion To Compel Responses To Judicial Counsel Form Interrogatories, Set Two, Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, That Request For Admissions Set One Be Deemed Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael Burke, Atty. for defendant and moving party: Roger Estey, Jr., Tamsen Plume, Chang, Julian Chen Lien
No appearances stated by Plantiff.

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: DEFENDANT ROGER ESTEY,JR, CHANG, JULIAN CHEN LIEN, TAMSEN PLUME's Motion To Compel Responses To Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, Set Two; Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two; That Request For Admissions, Set One, Be Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to Defendants' Form Interrogatories and Request For Production Of Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendants' Requests For Admission are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against PLAINTIFFS in the amount of $370, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Defendants shall prepare and submit an order as required by the California Rules Of Court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admission Admitted, Compelling Plaintiff To Respond Demand And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mr Schivo (Def.) and someone called d. berry (P) or something appeared- both sides were here

RULING: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: The motion is not opposed and it is granted, including money sanctions in the sum of $430.00 to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Responses to document demands are due within 15 calendar days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to prepare order. JUDGE CURTIS E. A. KARNOW. NOT REPORTED
